findings.title: commitScopedPaths の halt 経路の説明が不正確
findings.rationale: `parallel-review-round.ts:282` の `commitRoundArtifacts` 呼び出しは try-catch 外にあり、`commitScopedPaths` が throw した場合は executor catch を経由せず pipeline outer catch（`PIPELINE_UNHANDLED_ERROR` → `awaiting-resume`）に落ちる。「throw → executor catch → makeCommitFailHalt」の説明は `commitAndPush`（`finalizeStepArtifacts`）にのみ正確。ただし `commitScopedPaths` の `pushFailedError`（既存）も同じ outer-catch 経路を通っており、新旧の失敗は一貫してその経路に乗る。受け入れ基準「makeCommitFailHalt → CommitOrchestrator で適用されることを確認」を `commitAndPush` 経路のみに限定して読めば充足できる。

findings.title: gitExecExitCode spawn-error=1 conflation の影響は実質セーフ方向
findings.rationale: spawn error → diff=1（変更あり扱い）→ commit 試行 → commit spawn error も exit≠0 → throw → halt という経路で最終的に fail-closed になる。conflation が残っても安全方向に収束するため、要件 5 の対処優先度は低い。design step で確認・判断すれば十分。

observations.title: TC-CAP-008・TC-CAP-009 が現状 silent-skip を期待している（要更新）
observations.rationale: 要件 4 で明示されているが、add 失敗 → throw/halt を期待する形への更新が必要。commit-scoped-paths.test.ts の Branch 2 も同様。

toolResult.reason: Wrote design.md, spec.md, tasks.md under specrunner/changes/git-effect-failure-typed-halt/ on branch change/git-effect-failure-typed-halt-9c092a0b. Plan: make commitAndPush + commitScopedPaths throw typed COMMIT_AND_PUSH_FAILED errors on git add/diff(≥2)/commit failure (fail-closed), preserving legitimate no-op and agent self-commit paths. Key verified finding surfaced in design: the request's "both go through makeCommitFailHalt" framing is precise only for commitAndPush (Path A → executor catch → makeCommitFailHalt → commitHalt → failed). commitScopedPaths (Path B) is called directly at parallel-review-round.ts:282 with no try/catch, so its throw rides the SAME existing Pipeline.run() safety-net that pushFailedError already uses today (→ awaiting-resume), adding no new halt mechanism and leaving parallel-review-round.ts untouched. Design-delegation resolved: (a) new commitEffectFailedError factory (existing notGitRepo/noCommitDetected rejected on semantics); (b) new gitExecResult helper separates spawn failure from exit code so diff exit≥2 detection is ordering-independent; (c) no architecture/ or ADR change needed (no new invariant; B-13/B-14/B-15/D2 appliers unchanged). commitFinalState untouched. All edits scoped to the change folder.
